form.formComment: Returns after six-and-a-half months in the paddock. Finished off last preparation when well beaten into third behind Soulful Saul at Dayton Raceway over 1609m in a OHSS on September 26 at $33.60. Strong winning prospects.

form.formComment: Returns after six-and-a-half months in the paddock. Finished off last campaign when well beaten into third behind Big Ranger at Dayton Raceway over 1609m in a OHSS on September 27 at $32.30. Previous preparation first-up won by 11 m as favourite (Fr8) at this track (2:00.40) beating Neigh Brr Lady in 2YONW1PMCD on June 25 at $2.60. Capable of testing this line-up.

form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into second behind Deer In Range at this track over 1609m in a NW1PMCD on March 18 at $21.30. form.formComment: Three-year-old colt is racing in fine form. Won his last two outings at The Meadows both over 1609m. Last start won by 6 m as favourite (Fr1) at The Meadows (1:56.40) beating Summer Nights in CGNW1EXTPM on March 25 at $1.40. In terrific form and is the one to beat again.
